description_long: This rifle features a modern, tactical design with a prominent suppressor attached to the end of a long, cylindrical barrel. The stock is skeletonized, providing a lightweight yet sturdy rear section, and the grip is ergonomically shaped for comfortable handling. The receiver is compact and streamlined, with a detachable box magazine extending downward. The upper section appears to have a mounting rail, though no advanced optics are attached, and the iron sights are integrated into the body. The overall finish is matte black, giving it a sleek, non-reflective appearance suitable for urban environments. The construction suggests a combination of metal and polymer materials for durability and reduced weight.
description: A modern, matte black rifle with a suppressor, skeletonized stock, and detachable box magazine, designed for tactical use. The build is sleek and ergonomic, with a long barrel and integrated iron sights.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the suppressor, skeletonized stock, and detachable magazine.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular opening of the suppressor and the narrow profile of the barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the suppressor, stock, and magazine.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the open structure of the skeletonized stock and the alignment of the barrel and suppressor.
